policy: These cases protect current runtime reachability and compatibility behavior only. They do not establish naturalness, productivity, classifier semantics, possession, ordinal interpretation, noun-phrase licensing, or promotion eligibility.

cases.scope_note: Exercises the existing ordinal + classifier + overt head wrapper only. It does not generalize the interpretation of 第二 or establish productive ordinal syntax.
Exercises the nested possessor + classifier NP wrapper inside the bounded causative-result frame only. Standalone possessive-classifier coverage remains unresolved.

Protects the public compatibility alias exposed for the internal overt-head demonstrative-classifier NP. The alias is not a separately emitted internal construction and carries no independent linguistic claim.
